description_long: This object is a rustic wooden chaise styled as a handcart, featuring a flat slatted platform with raised side and rear panels constructed from horizontal wooden planks. The chaise is supported by two large spoked wooden wheels on either side, allowing for mobility, and two long wooden handles extend from the front for pushing or pulling. The wood has a warm, medium-brown finish, and the construction is robust, with visible grain and a slightly matte surface. The open design of the sides and back provides a spacious area for sitting or reclining, while the handles and wheels suggest it can be easily moved. The overall aesthetic is utilitarian and traditional, suitable for outdoor or urban park settings.
description: A rustic wooden chaise styled as a handcart, with slatted sides, large spoked wheels, and long handles for mobility. The warm brown finish and open design give it a traditional, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open slatted platform, raised side panels, and the two long handles extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked wheel, horizontal slatted construction, and the full length of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed back panel and the open interior space of the chaise.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the second wheel visible, mirroring the features of the first side.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a simple, vertical panel made of horizontal wooden slats, matching the side panels in height and style. It is unadorned, with no curvature or decorative elements, providing a basic supportive barrier at the rear.
attribute_armrest_presence: There are no traditional armrests; the raised side panels serve as low barriers along both sides.
attribute_leg_style: The chaise does not have conventional legs; instead, it is supported by two large, spoked wooden wheels on either side and two extended wooden handles at the front, all with a matching wood finish.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the seating surface consists of solid, evenly spaced wooden slats with a natural wood grain texture.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the chaise features a bare wooden platform without any attached or loose cushions.
